testcase.name: findByNameContainingIgnoreCase
testcase.system-out:
20:26:49.634 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.collabcrm.repository.CustomerRepositoryTest]: CustomerRepositoryTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:26:49.675 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.collabcrm.CollabCrmApplication for test class com.collabcrm.repository.CustomerRepositoryTest

Hibernate: create table customers (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, created_by uuid not null, id uuid not null, company varchar(255), email varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table finance_entries (amount numeric(12,2) not null, date date not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, created_by uuid not null, id uuid not null, type varchar(20) not null, created_by_username varchar(255), description varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table todos (done boolean not null, due_date date, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, created_by uuid not null, id uuid not null, priority varchar(20), created_by_username varchar(255), notes TEXT, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, role varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-04-15T20:26:50.705+02:00 INFO 81020 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-15T20:26:50.956+02:00 INFO 81020 --- [ main] c.c.repository.CustomerRepositoryTest : Started CustomerRepositoryTest in 1.263 seconds (process running for 1.661) Hibernate: insert into customers (company,created_at,created_by,email,name,phone,status,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?)
